description: User is on the Askable Sessions page, likely listening to or reading task instructions while the system processes input.
frame_description: The screen displays 'I hear you. What are you going to do next?' with buttons for 'Open' and 'Repeat the task instructions'.

description: The message on the Askable Sessions screen changes to 'Yes, please go ahead.'
frame_description: The central text on the dark background updates to confirm the user can proceed.

description: User switches browser tabs back to the WebJet flight search results page.
frame_description: The browser view changes from the Askable session to the WebJet flight results page.

description: User examines the flight search results, specifically looking at the airline options and prices.
frame_description: The user is viewing a list of flights from Maroochydore to London, with various airline logos and prices visible.
